title: Quickstack Reborn
description: Quickstack moves items to nearby containers only when they already contain the same item type.
body:
Inspired by Terraria and the functionality Quark had in 1.12, this mod introduces two new keybinds to the player inventory.

The first, dump, transfers all items into nearby chests, barrels, or any other container.

The second, quickstack, works just like in Terraria: it only places items into nearby chests if that chest already contains the same item type.


Quickstack Reborn is a port of the original Quickstack mod for newer Minecraft versions.

The original mod was created by tfarecnim.

I do not claim to be the original author of the mod; this project is solely a port made in accordance with the permissions granted by the mod’s license.
